name: resume-flyer
description: Dark, chaotic, and deep. This provides a novel way of exploring a resume. The resume is defined as a collection of jobs, skills, and categories parsed from a DOCX or PDF formatted resume file by the resume-parser utility.
author: Shawn Becker

scripts.start: npm run kill-listeners && concurrently "npm run node-server" "npm run open-chrome"
scripts.kill-listeners: pkill -f 'node server.mjs'; pkill -f 'nodemon'; pkill -f 'vite'; for port in 3001 3002 3003 5174 5175 5176; do lsof -ti:$port | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; true
scripts.clean: npm run kill-listeners && rm -rf node_modules dist .vite npm-debug.log* && npm cache clean --force
scripts.test: vitest run --config vitest.config.js && (cd color-palette-utils-ts && npm test)
scripts.test:coverage: vitest run --config vitest.config.js --coverage && (cd color-palette-utils-ts && npm run test:coverage)
